# Tiny Tower Defense Assets

Source: https://ilustramundogames.itch.io/tiny-tower-defense-assets

Imported from local download: `/home/weights/Downloads/assets.zip`

Current files:

- `assets/characters.png`
- `assets/mock.png`
- `assets/props.png`
- `assets/tileset1.png`
- `assets/towers.png`
- `assets/ui.png`

Usage intent:

- Prototype terrain, paths, towers, props, UI panels, and general tower-defense readability.
- Add Mangrove-specific software meaning as separate overlays instead of editing the source sprites heavily.

License note:

- The itch page lists this as name-your-own-price.
- A creator comment says commercial use is allowed with credit to `pixel.iwao`.
- Treat this as prototype-friendly, but keep Kenney CC0 packs as the safer fallback if license certainty becomes important.
